post.description:
Register a new company with an admin user.
This creates both the company and the first user (admin role).
Use multipart/form-data to include logo file.

- company_slug: Optional - auto-generated from company_name if not provided
- user_username: Optional - auto-generated from email if not provided
Login with email and password (form data).

Verify email with OTP.
Uses form data: user_id and otp
Resend verification OTP email.

Register a new individual user account (not tied to a company).
This is for viewers who want to follow channels and receive notifications.

schema.title: Response Signup User Auth Signup User Post

post.description:
Logout the current user by blacklisting their access token.
The user will need to login again to access protected endpoints.

get.description: Get current user info.

Verify if the current user has completed their email verification.
Returns is_verified = true if the user has verified their email.
Get current user's company info.

put.description:
Edit current user's company profile.
- name: can only be changed once every 30 days
- slug: can only be changed once every 30 days
- description: can be changed anytime
- logo: optional logo file upload

delete.description:
Delete current user's company and ALL associated data.
This will permanently delete:
- The company
- All company users
- All livestreams
- All recordings

This action cannot be undone!

get.description:
Search for companies by name (case-insensitive).
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

- q: Search query (partial match, case-insensitive)
- limit: Number of results to return (default 20)
- offset: Offset for pagination (default 0)

Returns list of companies matching the search query.

schema.title: Response Search Companies Companies Search Get

get.description:
Public page for a company/streamer.
Viewers can visit /companies/{company-slug} to see the company and join live streams.

Get all members of a company.
Only company members can view this.

schema.title: Response Get Company Members Companies  Company Id  Members Get

post.description:
Add a new user to a company.
Only admins can add users.

get.description:
Get user details.
Users can only view other users in their company.

delete.description:
Delete (deactivate) a user from a company.
Only admins can delete users. Cannot delete yourself.

get.description:
Get view analytics for the current user's company.

Query params:
- days: Optional filter for last N days (e.g., 7, 30). If not provided, returns all-time.

Returns:
- total_views: Total view count
- unique_viewers: Unique visitor count
- views_by_date: List of (date, count) tuples
- views_by_livestream: List of (slug, count) tuples

post.description: Subscribe/follow a company to receive notifications about their streams.

get.description: Get list of companies the current user is subscribed to.

schema.title: Response Get My Subscriptions Companies Subscriptions Get

post.description:
Start a new AUDIO-ONLY livestream.
Creates a Cloudflare Live Input and returns WebRTC URLs for audio broadcasting.

Optional thumbnail: An image file (jpg, png, webp) to use as the livestream's thumbnail.

Start a new VIDEO livestream.
Creates a Cloudflare Live Input and returns WebRTC URLs for video broadcasting.

Optional thumbnail: An image file (jpg, png, webp) to use as the livestream's thumbnail.

get.description:
Get playback URLs for a livestream.
Returns WebRTC playback and HLS/DASH URLs if available.

post.description:
Stop a livestream.
Only the creator or an admin can stop a stream.

Note: Recording upload is handled separately via the /{slug}/upload-recording endpoint.

get.description:
Get all livestreams for the current user's company.
Returns recording_url for livestreams that have recordings attached.

schema.title: Response Get Company Livestreams Livestreams Get

get.description:
Get all active livestreams across the platform.
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Returns all live streams from all active companies.

Get a specific livestream by slug.
Also records view when user accesses the livestream page.

post.description:
Upload a recording for an existing livestream.

The livestream must have ended (be inactive) before uploading a recording.
Only the creator or an admin can upload a recording for a stream.

Optional duration_seconds parameter: Duration of the recording in seconds (if available).

Returns the stream name, description, the S3 URL for playback, the thumbnail URL (from the livestream if no new thumbnail provided), and duration if provided.

get.description:
Get livestream chat messages with pagination.
Returns newest messages first.

schema.title: Response Get Livestream Messages Livestream Chat  Slug  Messages Get

post.description: Send a chat message to the livestream.

put.description:
Edit a chat message.
Only the message author can edit.

delete.description:
Delete a chat message (permanent/hard delete).
Only the message author or an admin can delete.

post.description:
Upload a media file directly (manual upload).

The file is uploaded to S3 under /uploaded-media/{company_id}/ path.
This does NOT require a livestream - users can upload existing recordings
from any source (local files, other platforms, Telegram exports, etc.)

Use multipart/form-data to upload:
- file: The media file (video or audio) - required
- thumbnail: Optional thumbnail image (jpg, png, webp)
- title: Title for the recording - required
- description: Optional description
- duration_seconds: Optional duration in seconds

get.description: Get all recordings for the current user's company.

Get all recordings for a specific company by slug.
Only accessible to users of that company.

schema.title: Response Get Recordings By Company Recordings  Company Slug  Get

get.description: Get a specific recording by ID.

delete.description:
Delete a recording.
Only admins can delete recordings.

get.description:
Get recording for public playback.
Records a replay when user accesses the recording.

Get replay statistics for a recording.
This endpoint does NOT record a replay - use /public/{recording_id} for that.
Use this for UI display of replay counts.

Get all public recordings for a company by company slug.
This endpoint is accessible to public viewers (no authentication required).

schema.title: Response Get Recordings By Company Public Recordings Public Company  Company Slug  Get

post.description: Mark a recording as completed by the user.
Update the user's watch position for a recording.

get.description:
Stream a recording directly from S3, masking the S3 URL.

This endpoint:
- Fetches the recording from S3 using s3_key
- Streams content with proper Content-Type headers
- Handles Range requests for video seeking
- Sets CORS headers

options.description: Handle CORS preflight for streaming endpoint

get.description: Get user's watch history for all recordings.
Get recordings user is currently watching (not completed).
Get recordings user has completed watching.

post.description: Admin login - only for platform superadmin.

get.description: Get platform-wide statistics (admin only).
List all companies (admin only).

schema.title: Response Get All Companies Platform Owners Companies Get

get.description: Get company details (admin only).
List all users across all companies (admin only).

schema.title: Response Get All Users Platform Owners Users Get

get.description: Get user details (admin only).
List all livestreams across all companies (admin only).

schema.title: Response Get All Livestreams Platform Owners Livestreams Get

get.description: Get livestream details (admin only).
List all recordings across all companies (admin only).

schema.title: Response Get All Recordings Platform Owners Recordings Get

post.description:
Subscribe to a company channel.
Requires authentication.

delete.description:
Unsubscribe from a company channel.
Requires authentication.

get.description:
Get all subscriptions for the current user.
Requires authentication.

schema.title: Response Get User Subscriptions Subscriptions Get

get.description:
Get subscriber count for a company.
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Get streaming statistics for a company.
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Get current viewer count for a livestream.
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Get list of anonymous viewers for a livestream.
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Returns currently connected anonymous viewers.
Check Telegram integration status

post.description:
Start Telegram authentication flow.
Sends code request to phone number.
Verify the code from Telegram and get channels.
Connect to a Telegram channel and save the connection.

get.description: List all Telegram connections for the company

post.description:
Import historical media from a Telegram channel.
Downloads video, audio, voice, and document messages.
Import new media since last sync.

get.description: List imported media from a connection

List media messages from a Telegram channel.
Fetches directly from Telegram (not only imported media).

post.description: Import a specific media by its Telegram message ID.
Create a playlist from imported media

get.description: Get playlist with all media items

post.description: Start pseudo-livestream playback
Stop pseudo-livestream playback

get.description:
List all imported media from Telegram for a company.
This endpoint lists media across all connections for the company.

post.description:
Create a playlist using company_id.
This allows creating a playlist without specifying a connection_id upfront.
The playlist can be populated with media from any of the company's connections.

Add external media (recording/upload) to an existing playlist.
This is for media that was NOT imported from Telegram (e.g., recordings or uploads).

Start an async download job that downloads media from Telegram.
Logs progress every 5 seconds showing download percentage until completion.
The job runs in the background and can be monitored via the status endpoint.

get.description:
Get the status of an async download job.
Returns progress, logs, and completion status.

Get all available subscription plans.
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

schema.title: Response Get Available Plans Api Subscriptions Plans Get

get.description: Get details of a specific plan

post.description: Create a new subscription plan (admin only).

Seed default subscription plans (admin only).
Creates Free, Starter, Pro, and Enterprise plans if they don't exist.

schema.title: Response Seed Plans Api Subscriptions Platform Owners Plans Seed Post

get.description:
Get current subscription for the user's company.
Requires authentication.

post.description:
Create a checkout session for subscription payment via Paystack.
Requires authentication.

get.description:
Verify payment and activate subscription.
Requires authentication.

post.description:
Paystack webhook endpoint for payment events.
Handles charge.success, subscription.created, subscription.disabled, etc.

Cancel the current subscription.
Requires authentication.

Change subscription plan (upgrade/downgrade).
Requires authentication.

Add integration add-ons to subscription.
Requires authentication.

get.description:
Get current usage statistics for the user's company.
Requires authentication.

Check if user can start a stream (within limits).
Requires authentication.

Check if user can upload (within monthly limit).
Requires authentication.

Validate a coupon code.
Supports both general and user-specific coupons.
Requires authentication.

Get coupons assigned to the current user or their company.
Requires authentication.

schema.title: Response Get My Coupons Api Coupons My Coupons Get

get.description:
Get referral information for the current user's company.
Requires authentication.

post.description:
Use a referral code during signup.
Requires authentication.

Create a new coupon (Platform owner only).
Requires superadmin privileges.

get.description:
List all coupons (Platform owner only).
Requires superadmin privileges.

schema.title: Response List Coupons Api Platform Owners Coupons Get

get.description:
Get coupon details (Platform owner only).
Requires superadmin privileges.

put.description:
Update a coupon (Platform owner only).
Requires superadmin privileges.

delete.description:
Deactivate a coupon (Platform owner only).
Requires superadmin privileges.

get.description:
Company home page (subdomain root).

Access: nobleinchrist.volantislive.com/

Also supports: /?company=nobleinchrist (fallback for API calls)

Company live stream page (subdomain).

Access: nobleinchrist.volantislive.com/live

Company streams list (subdomain).

Access: nobleinchrist.volantislive.com/streams

Company stream history (ended streams).

Access: nobleinchrist.volantislive.com/history

Company recordings list (subdomain).

Access: nobleinchrist.volantislive.com/recordings

Watch a specific stream (subdomain).

Access: nobleinchrist.volantislive.com/stream/{stream_slug}

Get realtime viewer count for company's active stream.

Access: nobleinchrist.volantislive.com/realtime
Health check for subdomain
Debug endpoint to see subdomain extraction details

Get company home page.
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Returns company info and current active livestream (if any).

Get company live page with current stream info.
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Returns company info and current active livestream (if any).

Get all livestreams (active and inactive) for a company.
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Returns streams sorted by creation date (newest first).

schema.title: Response Get Company Streams  Company Slug  Streams Get

get.description:
Get stream history for a company (completed streams only).
Public endpoint - no authentication required.

schema.title: Response Get Company Stream History  Company Slug  History Get

get.description:
Get a livestream by slug with view tracking.
Records a view for each non-bot request (per-day deduplication).
Returns unique view count from the livestream_views table.

This endpoint tracks views when users access the livestream page directly.

schema.title: Response Get Livestream With View Tracking Stream  Slug  Get

get.description:
Get realtime viewer count for a livestream.
This endpoint can be polled by the UI to display current viewer count.

Use WebSocket for real-time updates:
  ws://<host>/livestream/ws/{slug}?company_id=1

The WebSocket broadcasts 'viewer_count_update' events when viewers join/leave.
Get current viewer count for a room.
Get all active rooms and their counts.
